metadata.description: Official Chainlink agent skills for CRE, CCIP, Data Feeds, Data Streams, ACE, and VRF.

plugins.name: chainlink-cre-skill
plugins.description: CRE workflows, CLI/SDK, triggers, simulation, deployment, and monitoring.

plugins.name: chainlink-ccip-skill
plugins.description: CCIP cross-chain transfers, messaging, contracts, monitoring, discovery, and CCT.

plugins.name: chainlink-data-feeds-skill
plugins.description: Chainlink Data Feeds integration across EVM and non-EVM chains.

plugins.name: chainlink-data-streams-skill
plugins.description: Data Streams SDKs, report decoding, WebSocket HA, and on-chain verification.

plugins.name: chainlink-ace-skill
plugins.description: ACE compliance engine, policies, Cross-Chain Identity, and regulated tokens.

plugins.name: chainlink-vrf-skill
plugins.description: VRF v2.5 subscription and direct-funding consumers, billing, and network addresses.
